title: cotula mexicana
intro: Cotula mexicana, also known as Mexican button marigold or Mexican fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as its ability to act as a natural antiseptic and antibacterial agent. Cotula mexicana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
